sections.paragraph:
m. adj. קָשָׁה f.-

(1) hard, used of hard servitude, Exo 1:14 6:9 1Ki 12:4 hard, i.e. harsh words, Gen 42:7, 30 Gen 42:30 Job 30:25, קְשֵׁה־יֹום “whose day is hard,” whose lot is hard, unhappy.

(2) firm, fast, σκληρός, Son 8:6 and in a bad sense, hardened. קְשֵׁה עֹרֶף stubborn, Exo 32:9 34:9 קְשֵׁה פָנִים hard-faced, impudent, Eze 2:4 קְשֵׁה לֵב stubborn of heart, Eze 3:7 without לֵב id., Isa 48:4.

(3) heavy-(a) i.q. vehement, of a wind, Isa 27:8 of a battle, 2Sa 2:17.-(b) i.q. powerful, strong, 2Sa 3:39.-(c) קְשֵׁה רוּחַ heavy in spirit, sad in spirit, 1Sa 1:15.

(4) difficult, hard, Exo 18:26.
